title: Run any Dockerfile on Vercel
whyItMatters: You have a server in a container. Maybe it's a Go service, a Rails app, a Spring Boot API, or a web server behind nginx. It speaks HTTP. It listens on a port. It just needs somewhere to run. Add a Dockerfile.vercel file to your project, and Vercel builds, stores, deploys, and autoscales the image on Fluid compute , so you pay only for the CPU your code uses…
